title: onobrychis calabrica
intro: Onobrychis calabrica, also known as Sardinian melilot, is a perennial legume plant belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been shown to possess various health benefits. The health benefits of Onobrychis calabrica include its potential in reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestion. Herbal preparations of Onobrychis calabrica can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues.
